message:
INFEASIBLE — The solver could not find any timetable that satisfies all rules and allocations together. Try:
  1. Reduce schedule restrictions on the most-loaded teachers (Teachers page → reduce 'Cannot teach before period')
  2. Disable R1 (class teacher at P1) on Allotment page to confirm if R1 is the cause
  3. Check that no teacher has been over-restricted (e.g., starts at P5 but has 30+ periods)
